description: Pre-flight spend authorization for AI agents. Set a budget, enforce limits, audit every decision.
name: io.github.figuard/figuard-mcp

environmentVariables.description: FiGuard API key — set this (with FIGUARD_BASE_URL) to use a self-hosted FiGuard server. Leave unset to run embedded: in-process enforcement against a local SQLite file, no account or server needed.
environmentVariables.name: FIGUARD_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Self-hosted FiGuard server URL. Leave unset to run embedded against a local SQLite file.
environmentVariables.name: FIGUARD_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Path to the embedded SQLite file (default ~/.figuard/figuard.db). Embedded is the default backend — no server required.
environmentVariables.name: FIGUARD_DATABASE

environmentVariables.description: Backend mode: embedded | server | sandbox. Defaults to embedded when nothing else is configured.
environmentVariables.name: FIGUARD_MODE
